name: orbit-artifact-review
description: Antigravity-style artifact review with block-level comments and agent feedback loop

artifactReview.postApprove.action.description: What Orbit should do after a successful Proceed approval. 'ask' prompts for the target agent at approval time, while terminal modes launch Codex or Claude automatically.

artifactReview.postApprove.codexCommand.description: CLI command used when post-approve action is 'codexTerminal'.

artifactReview.postApprove.claudeCommand.description: CLI command used when post-approve action is 'claudeTerminal'.

artifactReview.postApprove.resumeLatestS.description: When enabled, terminal agent modes try to resume the latest local session first and fall back to starting a new one.

artifactReview.postApprove.promptTemplat.default: Continue implementing the approved plan at ${sourcePath}. Read the plan, inspect the repository, and proceed automatically.
artifactReview.postApprove.promptTemplat.description: Prompt template used for the automatic post-approve follow-up. Available variables: ${sourcePath}, ${resolvedPath}, ${sourceDir}, ${workingDirectory}.

artifactReview.postApprove.vscodeCommand.description: VS Code command to run when post-approve action is 'vscodeCommand'. Orbit passes a single context object containing sourcePath, resolvedPath, sourceDir, workingDirectory, and prompt.
